## Diagram 1

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    Start([Start]) --> CheckDir["Working dir: /fv-net/ (GitLab root)"]
    CheckDir --> PublishQueue["Run publish.sh: Queue Processor\nargs: prod, fvprod, us-east-1, shipments, Fv.Net.Queue.Processor, shipment-active-shipment.json, 1, rules/shipment-active-shipment.json, ENABLED"]
    PublishQueue --> PublishDB["Run publish.sh: DatabaseCommandProcessor\nargs: prod, fvprod, us-east-1, shipments, Fv.Net.DatabaseCommandProcessor, '', -1, rules/shipments-active-shipment-stale-queue-reset.json, ENABLED"]
    PublishDB --> SetStages["Set CURRENT_STAGES = [prod]\nBASE_RULE_NAME = net-shipments-db-cmd-processor-active_shipment-rule"]
    SetStages --> ForEach["Loop: for CURRENT_STAGE in CURRENT_STAGES"]
    ForEach --> BuildRule["rule_name = $CURRENT_STAGE-$BASE_RULE_NAME"]
    BuildRule --> ListTargets["aws events list-targets-by-rule\n--profile fvprod --region us-east-1 --rule rule_name --query Targets[*].Id --output text"]
    ListTargets --> HasTargets{TARGET_IDS non-empty?}
    HasTargets -->|yes| RemoveTargets["aws events remove-targets\n--profile fvprod --region us-east-1 --rule rule_name --ids $TARGET_IDS"]
    HasTargets -->|no| SkipRemove["No targets to remove"]
    RemoveTargets --> DeleteRule["aws events delete-rule\n--profile fvprod --region us-east-1 --name rule_name"]
    SkipRemove --> DeleteRule
    DeleteRule --> Echo["echo Deleting the rule: rule_name"]
    Echo --> End([End])
```

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Script
    participant Publish as publish.sh
    participant AWS as AWS_EventBridge
    participant Console as Console
    Script->>Publish: publish queue processor (prod, fvprod, us-east-1, shipments, Fv.Net.Queue.Processor, shipment-active-shipment.json, 1, rules/shipment-active-shipment.json, ENABLED)
    Publish-->>Script: publish result
    Script->>Publish: publish db command processor (prod, fvprod, us-east-1, shipments, Fv.Net.DatabaseCommandProcessor, '', -1, rules/shipments-active-shipment-stale-queue-reset.json, ENABLED)
    Publish-->>Script: publish result
    Script->>AWS: list-targets-by-rule(profile=fvprod, region=us-east-1, rule=prod-net-shipments-db-cmd-processor-active_shipment-rule)
    AWS-->>Script: TARGET_IDS (space-separated ids or empty)
    alt TARGET_IDS present
        Script->>AWS: remove-targets --ids $TARGET_IDS
        AWS-->>Script: remove-targets result
    else TARGET_IDS empty
        Note right of Script: No targets found, skipping remove-targets
    end
    Script->>AWS: delete-rule --name prod-net-shipments-db-cmd-processor-active_shipment-rule
    AWS-->>Script: delete confirmation
    Script->>Console: echo Deleting the rule: prod-net-shipments-db-cmd-processor-active_shipment-rule
```

## Diagram 3

```mermaid
stateDiagram
    [*] --> Initialized
    Initialized --> PublishQueue: run publish.sh (queue processor)
    PublishQueue --> PublishDB: run publish.sh (db command processor)
    PublishDB --> StageIteration: set CURRENT_STAGES and BASE_RULE_NAME
    StageIteration --> ListedTargets: list-targets-by-rule
    ListedTargets --> TargetsRemoved: if TARGET_IDS non-empty
    ListedTargets --> NoTargets: if TARGET_IDS empty
    TargetsRemoved --> RuleDeleted: remove-targets then delete-rule
    NoTargets --> RuleDeleted: delete-rule
    RuleDeleted --> [*]
```
